landing.hero_title: Bring Your Ideas to Life with
landing.hero_description: A decentralized crowdfunding platform built on Base. Create campaigns, gather community support, and bring your ideas to life with full transparency and security.
landing.why_description: Experience the future of crowdfunding with blockchain technology
landing.feature_transparent_desc: All transactions are recorded on the blockchain, ensuring complete transparency and accountability.
landing.feature_secure_desc: Smart contracts manage funds automatically. No third party can interfere.
landing.feature_global_desc: Anyone, anywhere, can create or support campaigns using their crypto wallet.
landing.feature_community_desc: Fund projects that matter to you. Every contribution helps turn ideas into reality.
landing.feature_no_fee_desc: We don't take a cut from successful campaigns. Your funds go directly to the campaign creator.
landing.feature_instant_desc: Funds are automatically distributed when the campaign goal is reached.
landing.how_description: Simple, secure, and transparent crowdfunding in three steps
landing.how_step1_desc: Set your funding goal, deadline, and campaign details. No approval process required.
landing.how_step2_desc: Share your campaign with the community. Supporters contribute using their crypto wallets.
landing.how_step3_desc: When the goal is reached, funds are automatically sent to the campaign creator's wallet.
landing.cta_description: Join thousands of creators who have successfully funded their projects

home.discover_description: Support innovative projects and turn ideas into reality
home.no_campaigns_description: Try adjusting your search keywords or filter criteria

campaign.claimed_notice: Funds have been claimed by the campaign creator.
campaign.successful_notice: Campaign successful! Creator can claim the funds.
campaign.failed_notice: Goal not reached. Contributors can request a refund.

create.wallet_required_desc: You need to connect your wallet to create a campaign. Please connect your wallet first.
create.title: Create New Campaign
create.subtitle: Launch your crowdfunding campaign and gather community support
create.description_placeholder: Describe your campaign, why it matters, and how the funds will be used
create.start_now_hint: Campaign will be active and accept contributions immediately after creation
create.start_later_hint: The date your campaign starts accepting contributions
create.end_date_hint: Campaign duration must be between 1 day and 90 days
create.guideline_1: Campaign must have a clear and achievable goal
create.guideline_2: Be transparent about how funds will be used
create.guideline_4: Funds are only released if the goal is reached
create.guideline_5: All transactions are recorded on the blockchain
create.error_invalid_image: Please select a valid image file
create.error_image_size: Image file size must be less than 5MB

detail.not_found_desc: The campaign you are looking for is not available or no longer exists.
detail.cancelled_desc: This campaign has been cancelled by its creator before it started.
detail.updates_empty: No updates yet. Check back later!
detail.manage_campaign_desc: Campaign has not started yet. You can cancel it before the start date.
detail.contribution_notice: You have contributed {{amount}} to this campaign
detail.funds_claimed_desc: Campaign funds have been successfully claimed by the campaign creator.
detail.campaign_successful_desc: Campaign successful! The campaign creator can claim the funds.
detail.campaign_failed_desc: Campaign goal was not reached. Contributors can request a refund.
detail.connect_wallet_desc: Connect your wallet to support this campaign

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.welcome: Welcome back! Here's a summary of your crowdfunding activity.
dashboard.no_campaigns_desc: Create your first campaign to get started
dashboard.no_contributions_desc: Start supporting campaigns to see them here

wallet.fix_step_1: 1. Click the MetaMask extension icon in your browser
wallet.fix_step_2: 2. Enter your password to unlock (if locked)
wallet.fix_step_3: 3. Make sure you have at least one account created

network_selector.select_network_desc: Choose the blockchain network you want to use
network_selector.network_info_1: Both networks use ETH for gas fees
network_selector.network_info_2: Contracts are deployed on both networks
network_selector.network_info_3: Lower fees on the Base network

protected.access_restricted_desc: This page can only be accessed by users who have connected their wallet.
protected.connect_to_continue: Please connect your wallet to continue to
protected.no_wallet_suffix: or another Web3 wallet to start using OpenFund.

transaction.default_message: Please wait while your transaction is being processed.
transaction.success_message: Your transaction has been confirmed on the blockchain.
transaction.error_message: Your transaction could not be completed. Please try again.
transaction.pending_message: Please wait while your transaction is being processed.

footer.description: A decentralized crowdfunding platform built on Base. Fund your ideas with transparency and community support.
footer.newsletter_desc: Get notified about new campaigns and platform updates.

errors.not_campaign_creator: You are not the creator of this campaign
errors.network_mismatch: Please switch to the correct network
errors.network_not_supported: This network is not supported. Please switch to Base Sepolia or Ethereum Sepolia.
